## Summary

Describe the change and its user-visible effect.

## Verification

- [ ] Rust formatting, clippy, and tests pass.
- [ ] Web tests, typecheck, and a source-built WASM production build pass when web code changes.
- [ ] Native Rust and Android assembly pass when Android or planner code changes.
- [ ] No credentials, personal health data, local paths, generated binaries, or signing material are included.
- [ ] Privacy and security documentation still matches actual behavior.
